name: Good Neighbor Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces processed cheese (such as Velveeta), cut into 1-inch cubes
2 cans condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 ounce)
1 cup canned or homemade chicken broth
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Mix together the chicken, cooked spaghetti, cheese, cream of mushroom soup, evaporated milk, chicken broth and olives, if using. Place the mixture in a 9-by-13-inch casserole dish. Bake for 45 minutes, or until hot and bubbly. To package for freezing: Transfer the mixed ingredients from the bowl to a freezer bag, removing as much air as possible. Seal and flatten before storing. Thaw in the refrigerator overnight. Spread the thawed mixture into a casserole dish and bake according to recipe directions. This recipe can be scaled up, but you may need to add more chicken broth. Some recipes seem to require a bit more liquid when they are frozen, thawed, and cooked.
